title: 8B The Science We Need — Наука и технологии

items.example: I love my new hand-held massager for relaxing tired muscles.
This microwave is really user-friendly — you don't need the instruction book.
An energy-efficient heater will save you lots of money on bills.
The health tracker uses state-of-the-art technology to monitor your health.
One of the best things about this device is that it's completely recyclable.
This cleaning product contains no hazardous chemicals and is environmentally friendly.
Some cleaning products contain hazardous chemicals that are harmful to the environment.
This hand-held device is great for massaging tired muscles.
The invention of the smartphone changed the way we communicate.
